div.h3: Archetype Dense Array vs HashMap: Cache Efficiency Comparison

ul.li: 1 cache miss per 8 components (64-byte line ÷ 8 bytes)
Pointer chasing through scattered heap nodes The Math:

ol.li: Node → Value (~100 cycles) ~240 cycles per component vs ~4 cycles for dense array

div.p: ptr ──────────────────→ Heap Node │ │ │ ├─ key: Entity │ └─ value: Position │ ~100 cycles to fetch
ptr → Node → Node → Node (collision chain) Each hop: potential cache miss
